ground.what_this_is: This is a high-fidelity desktop interface mockup for a 'Commander's Bridge' system, designed to visualize a complex workflow where a single subject (the 'ask' node) is simultaneously managed across three distinct zones: a central board, a right-side inspector, and a bottom conversation pane.
ground.what_you_can_do: You can explore the proposed layout and color-coded status indicators (gold for active, orange for awaiting, coral for failed) to understand how the system visualizes the 'simultaneity' of a single task across the screen.

howto.how_to_change: It lives in the toolbar region (canvas/app/src/regions/Toolbar.tsx); changing the run action is a code change there, surfaced via the build-intent wire.
howto.what: The run command on the bridge's command strip.
howto.what_you_can_do: Initiate the system's active execution cycle, shifting the board from observation to action.

howto.how_to_change: It lives in the toolbar region (canvas/app/src/regions/Toolbar.tsx); adding or changing a control is a code change there, surfaced via the build-intent wire.
howto.what: The layers control on the bridge's command strip.
howto.what_you_can_do: Open the layers panel to manage the structural depth of the current board view.

howto.how_to_change: It lives in the board region (canvas/app/src/regions/Board.tsx); changing its state or appearance is a code change there, surfaced via the build-intent wire.
howto.what: The active subject node on the Commander's Bridge board.
howto.what_you_can_do: Observe the single 'ask' node being managed across zones; its state (active, awaiting, failed) is visualized by color-coded status indicators.

howto.how_to_change: It lives in the codebase region (canvas/app/src/regions/Codebase.tsx); changing the re-run logic is a code change there.
howto.what: The volatile context control on the codebase board.
howto.what_you_can_do: See the live repository state re-evaluated in one context; observe how the system re-runs to reflect current reality.

howto.how_to_change: It lives in the canvas region (canvas/app/src/NodeShape.tsx); changing its behavior or appearance is a code change there.
howto.what: The codebase node on the live canvas board.
howto.what_you_can_do: Select this node to inspect its volatile live-repo state, or drag it to reposition it on the board; it represents a single context that always re-runs.

howto.how_to_change: Mockup-only; no built code path maps to this specific text yet. Changes would require updating the model definition in the source region.
howto.what: The explicit model definition for the 'ask' node within the Commander's Bridge workspace.
howto.what_you_can_do: Read the explicit principles governing the node's behavior and state; this view is for inspection and understanding the model's constraints, not for direct manipulation of the node's runtime logic.

howto.how_to_change: The node's visual state and data are driven by the canvas region (canvas/app/src/NodeShape.tsx) and the specific node shape logic; structural changes require edits to the canvas region or the node shape definition.
howto.what: A cached node on the canvas board representing a specific model of Tim.
howto.what_you_can_do: Select this node to inspect its cached state (principles.md) and its status (gold dot for active, orange for awaiting, coral for failed); it reflects the live run-state of the composition.

howto.how_to_change: It lives in the join region (canvas/app/src/regions/Join.tsx); changing it is a code change there.
howto.what: The merge control on the join board.
howto.what_you_can_do: Combine two input streams into a single text output.

howto.how_to_change: The node shape and port logic live in NodeShape.tsx; the specific 'join' behavior is driven by the NODE-ports configuration in the canvas region.
howto.what: A join node on the canvas board with input and output ports.
howto.what_you_can_do: Select the node to inspect its state ('idle'), or drag its ports to wire connections to other nodes, merging two inputs into one text output.

howto.how_to_change: It lives in the rollup region (canvas/app/src/regions/Rollup.tsx); changing the message or state is a code change there.
howto.what: The status indicator showing the system is waiting for the morning's execution runs.
howto.what_you_can_do: Observe the system's readiness state; this element signals that the workflow is paused and awaiting the next operational input.

howto.how_to_change: Mockup-only; no built code path maps to this specific wiring view yet.

howto.what_you_can_do: Observe the high-fidelity layout where the system visualizes the simultaneity of a single task across zones; this element represents the intent to wire the node's state.

howto.how_to_change: This node is an instance of the generic node shape defined in NodeShape.tsx; changing its behavior or appearance requires editing the NodeShape.tsx region or the specific node instance data in the App.tsx shell.
howto.what: The 'ask' node on the central board, a specific instance of a node that has fired based on resolved inputs.
howto.what_you_can_do: Select this node to inspect its answer in the inspector pane; observe its status indicators (gold/orange/coral) to see if it is active, awaiting, or failed.

howto.what_you_can_do: Initiate a request or inquiry for the selected node, triggering the system to generate a course-of-action or decision based on the node's current state.

reasons: refcheck (Layer 1, deterministic floor): feature fabrication: maps_to_feature 'RHM-presence' is not an inventory id nor 'proposed'
accuracy jury (Layer 2, SOFT — variance not error): no quorum that the dossier is grounded in the element (0 of 3 draws agreed grounded). Flagged for operator scrutiny.
